highlights.title: Show HN: I built a tiny LLM to demystify how language models work
highlights.text:
Built a ~9M param LLM from scratch to understand how they actually work. Vanilla transformer, 60K synthetic conversations, ~130 lines of PyTorch. Trains in 5 min on a free Colab T4. The fish thinks the meaning of life is food.

Fork it and swap the personality for your own character.
highlights.summary: Show HN: I built a tiny LLM to demystify how language models work. Built a ~9M param LLM from scratch to understand how they actually work. Vanilla transformer, 60K synthetic conversations, ~130 lines of PyTorch. 점수 254, 반응 21 기준 인기 이슈입니다.
